config.netlify.no_token_desc: Add a Netlify Personal Access Token via the vault to enable the integration.
config.netlify.disabled_desc: Ative o botão acima para permitir que o agente gerencie sites, deploys, variáveis de ambiente e mais no Netlify.
config.netlify.permissions_desc: Controle quais operações Netlify o agente pode realizar.
config.netlify.allow_env_management: Permitir gerenciamento de variáveis de ambiente
config.netlify.site_config_desc: Optional defaults for Netlify API calls.
config.netlify.token_desc: Personal Access Token from Netlify. Stored securely in the vault.
config.netlify.test_desc: Verify that the stored token can reach the Netlify API.
